semanticCore: Crescent, shouting joy, dedicating, praise, cheer, or moon
quranicRelevance: Slaughter dedicated/offered to other than God (Ohilla - 'wa ma ohilla bihi lighayri Allah'), and crescent moons marking Hajj (Ahillah - 'yas'aloonaka 'ani al-ahillati').

keyDerivations.meaning: To dedicate aloud, invoke a name (at slaughter), shout out, or raise voice
Crescent moon / crescent moons (marking lunar calendar months)

figurativeOrRareUsages: وَمَا أُهِلَّ بِهِ لِغَيْرِ اللَّهِ (2:173): And what has been dedicated/slaughtered aloud in the name of other than God (dietary prohibition of pagan sacrifices).
discardedNoise: The crescent shape of architectural domes.
summaryEn: The root connects vocal exclamation with celestial markers, detailing the vocal pagan dedication (Ihlal) of meat to idols, and crescent moons (Ahillah) marking calendars.
summaryAr: يربط هذا الجذر بين رفع الصوت بالفزع والذكر والمواقيت الفلكية، واصفاً تهليل الصوت باسم الصنم عند الذبح الحرام (وما أُهلّ)، وأهلة شهور القمر.
rawText: أَهْلَلْنَا هِلَالَ شَهْرِ كَذَا 4 : see سَلَخَ. الهِلاَلُ The new moon; or the moon when it is termed هِلاَل: it may be explained as meaning, generally, the moon when near the sun, or moon a little after or before the change. === See سَمَا. اِسْتَهَلَّ 10 : see a verse cited at the close of the first paragraph of art. ضحك. === See also a verse cited voce أَفْثَأَ. === See مُسْتَهَلٌّ. مُسْتَهَلُّ الشَّهْرِ The first night of the lunar month. (Msb.) هَلَّةٌ : see بَلَّةٌ. هَلْ may be originally هَلْو or هَلْى or هَلّ: (Akh, in S, voce بل:) see بَلْ. === هَلْ followed by إِلَى: see the latter. === حَىّ هَلَ: see حى. === هَلَّا: see حَضَّةٌ and عَنْ, latter part, and لَوْلَا, and أَلَّا.
